name: codex-history-suite
description: Build, incrementally maintain, audit, migrate, search, and trace a portable evidence-first knowledge base from local Codex transcripts.

interface.shortDescription: Portable, evidence-first memory for Codex history.
interface.longDescription: Codex History Suite provides a checkpointed cross-platform builder and a read-only progressive retrieval Skill over local Codex transcripts, Evidence, claims, tool traces, and artifact CAS.
interface.defaultPrompt: Build or query my local Codex history knowledge base with evidence tracing.
